derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_OrderLine WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_ORDERLINETAX WHERE C_ORDERLINE_ID=@C_OrderLine_ID@
SELECT C_BPartner_ID AS DefaultValue FROM C_Order WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_ORDER_DISCOUNT WHERE C_ORDER_ID=@C_ORDER_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_ORDERTAX WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@
